name.en: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
name.hi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय विकलांगता पेंशन योजना

benefit.en: Monthly pension of rupees 300 (and additional state top-up where applicable) to BPL persons with severe or multiple disability aged 18 or above
benefit.hi: गंभीर या बहु-विकलांगता वाले BPL व्यक्तियों को मासिक 300 रुपये पेंशन

eligibility_rules_human: Indian citizen aged 18 or above, BPL household, with severe disability (80%+) or multiple disability as certified by a competent medical authority.
required_documents: BPL ration card or SECC verification
Disability certificate from competent medical authority

application_paths.offline_office_pattern: Block Development Office / Gram Panchayat / urban local body
offline_steps: Obtain disability certificate from district hospital / CMO
Submit application form at BDO or municipal office
Pension credited monthly to bank account via DBT
